sections.heading: PHбәҰN I вҖ“ TRIбәҫT LГқ & Hб»Ҷ THб»җNG THIбәҫT Kбәҫ

content_blocks.text: TeraChat lГ  Enterprise Sovereign Messenger вҖ” khГҙng phбәЈi Slack bГ¬nh thЖ°б»қng.

rows: Glassmorphism. Enterprise. Tб»‘i giбәЈn nhЖ°ng dГ y thГҙng tin.
Nhanh. ДҗГЎng tin cбәӯy. BбәЈo mбәӯt ngбә§m khГҙng bбәҜt ngЖ°б»қi dГ№ng Д‘б»ғ ГҪ.
NhГўn viГӘn chГӯnh phб»§, doanh nghiб»Үp tГ i chГӯnh, tбәӯp Д‘oГ n nб»ҷi bб»ҷ.
Bubble chat kiб»ғu WhatsApp. MГ u nб»Ғn mб»—i ngЖ°б»қi mб»—i mГ u. UX game hГіa thГЎi quГЎ.

subsections.heading: Hai trбәЎng thГЎi hoбәЎt Д‘б»ҷng (bбәҜt buб»ҷc phбәЈi phГўn biб»Үt rГө vб»Ғ visual)

data: Online Mode вҖ” Kбәҝt nб»‘i Server chuбә©n: Nб»Ғn sГЎng, blur trбәҜng, accent #24A1DE.

content_blocks.code:
Layer 1 вҶ’ App Background (dark navy gradient hoбә·c white)
Layer 2 вҶ’ Sidebar/Rail Glass      (blur: 16вҖ“18px)
Layer 3 вҶ’ Work Area Glass         (blur: 12px)

lines: Mб»—i tбә§ng phбәЈi cГі blur depth **khГЎc nhau** Д‘б»ғ tбәЎo chiб»Ғu sГўu thбәӯt sб»ұ (khГҙng flat).

вҡ пёҸ **Adaptive UI Degradation (Chб»‘ng ccan pin):** Khi kГӯch hoбәЎt Mesh Mode, Engine Glassmorphism PHбәўI tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng tбәҜt. Quy tбәҜc bбәҜt buб»ҷc: Khi biбәҝn `--mode: mesh` Д‘Ж°б»Јc set, toГ n bб»ҷ `backdrop-filter`, `box-shadow`, vГ  CSS `animation` vГҙ Д‘iб»Ғu kiб»Үn phбәЈi bб»Ӣ disable.

data: Background: #0F172A solid (OLED Black вҖ” tбәҜt pixel cЖ°б»Ўng bб»©c, khГҙng GPU composite layer)
Glass: backdrop-filter: none вҖ” thay bбәұng mГЈ mГ u phбәіng (Flat Dark) rgba(255,255,255,0.06) khГҙng blur

Radar вҖ” Event-driven SVG (khГҙng dГ№ng CSS loop): Biб»ғu tЖ°б»Јng radar lГ  SVG tД©nh, chб»ү thay Д‘б»•i opacity (0.3 вҶ’ 1.0 вҶ’ 0.3) khi Loo iRust Core dispatch tГӯn hiб»Үu MESH_PACKET_RECEIVED. KhГҙng cГі setInterval hay animation: pulse infinite.
Banner top: "Mesh Active вҖ“ N nodes connected" (cбәӯp nhбәӯt mб»—i lбә§n node join/leave, khГҙng animate liГӘn tб»Ҙc)

## 10. Chats

### Layout Desktop/Laptop

- Mб»—i row:

- Hover: highlight 3%, indicator trГЎi nhбә№.

### Chat Header (56px)

Glass background blur 12вҖ“16px.

**BГӘn trГЎi:**

- Channel name `16px SemiBold`
- Department tag badge
- `рҹ”’ E2EE Active` icon

**BГӘn phбәЈi:**

- Search in conversation
- Call (nбәҝu Zone 1)
- Screen share (Zone 1)
- Info icon (mб»ҹ Info Panel)

**Mesh Mode:**

- Banner mб»Ҹng phГӯa dЖ°б»ӣi header: `"Mesh Active вҖ“ 12 nearby nodes connected"`

### Message List (Trб»Қng tГўm вҖ” KHГ”NG BUBBLE)

content_blocks.text: Message nб»ҷi dung Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§ chiб»Ғu rб»ҷng

content_blocks.code:
**Typography:**

- Username: 13px Medium
- Timestamp: 12px muted
- Message: 14px Regular, line-height 1.6

#### Khб»ҹi Д‘б»ҷng LбәЎnh & Skeleton UI (Render khung xЖ°ЖЎng cб»©ng)

- рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **Hardcoded Skeleton UI:** Hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ tб»©c thГ¬ (0ms - 50ms) khung xЖ°ЖЎng mang phong cГЎch Glassmorphism mГ  khГҙng cбә§n chб»қ I/O tб»« cЖЎ sб»ҹ dб»Ҝ liб»Үu.
- рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **Pure Renderer Architecture:** Logic xб»ӯ lГҪ dб»Ҝ liб»Үu Д‘Ж°б»Јc tГЎch biб»Үt hoГ n toГ n khб»Ҹi tбә§ng hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ (Native/DOM), giГәp UI khГҙng bб»Ӣ block bб»ҹi quГЎ trГ¬nh khб»ҹi Д‘б»ҷng hб»Ү thб»‘ng tД©nh cб»§a Rust Core.
- рҹ“ұ **Quy tбәҜc Дҗiб»Ғu hЖ°б»ӣng Thб»Ӣ giГЎc:** Layout Skeleton hardcode sбәөn thanh Input vГ  cГЎc khб»‘i tin nhбәҜn dбәЎng mб»қ (Blur) cб»‘ Д‘б»Ӣnh Д‘б»ғ Д‘б»Ӣnh hЖ°б»ӣng ГЎnh nhГ¬n cб»§a ngЖ°б»қi dГ№ng ngay khi app vб»«a mб»ҹ.

#### Hiб»Үu б»©ng Magic Reveal & Stubs (Staggered Native Reveal)

- рҹ“ұ **Staggered Slide-Up:** Animation trЖ°б»Јt so le tб»« trГӘn xuб»‘ng Д‘Ж°б»Јc thб»ұc thi trб»ұc tiбәҝp trГӘn Native Thread (tГЎc Д‘б»ҷng thбәіng vГ o Transform Y vГ  Opacity), Д‘бәЈm bбәЈo Д‘бәЎt 120fps mГ  khГҙng chб»Ӣu nghбәҪn luб»“ng tб»« JS Bridge.
- рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **Zero-Byte Blur-Hash Stubbing:** TrЖ°б»ӣc khi tбәЈi бәЈnh gб»‘c, UI lбәӯp tб»©c render cГЎc "Zero-Byte Stubs" (<5KB JPEG E2EE chб»©a Hash Blur) tбәЎo thГ nh khб»‘i mГ u kГӯnh Glassmorphism mб»қ бәЈo.
- рҹ“ұ **Spring Physics:** ГҒp dб»Ҙng hiб»Үu б»©ng nбәЈy nhбә№ (Spring) mang tГӯnh vбәӯt lГҪ cho mб»—i tin nhбәҜn khi xuбәҘt hiб»Үn, tДғng cбәЈm giГЎc chГўn thб»ұc vГ  khГҙng gian tЖ°ЖЎng tГЎc.

#### Glassmorphism State Update & Glow Effect (Hiб»Үu б»©ng ThГҙng minh)

- рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **TrбәЎng thГЎi `ai_ready`:** Cбәӯp nhбәӯt trбәЎng thГЎi hб»Ү thб»‘ng vГ  giao diб»Үn UI thГҙng qua luб»“ng IPC siГӘu nhбә№ Д‘б»ғ bбәӯt hiб»Үu б»©ng Glow lГіe sГЎng viб»Ғn mЖ°б»Јt mГ  mang phong cГЎch kГӯnh khi AI rГ  quГ©t (tГ¬m kiбәҝm thГҙng minh) thГ nh cГҙng 20 tin nhбәҜn gбә§n nhбәҘt, bГЎo hiб»Үu sбәөn sГ ng xб»ӯ lГҪ siГӘu vДғn bбәЈn.

## 11. Notifications

### Filter bar
### Notification row

- **Approval:** CTA `[Review]` inline.
- **Security Alert:** badge Д‘б»Ҹ, tap mб»ҹ detail.
- **Audit Event:** muted, khГҙng CTA.

#### TrбәЎng thГЎi Skeleton khi Д‘ang giбәЈi mГЈ an toГ n tб»« NSE

- рҹ“ұрҹ’» Khi Notification Д‘бәҝn tб»« NSE nhЖ°ng Main App chЖ°a kб»Ӣp Д‘б»“ng bб»ҷ khГіa mб»ӣi (OOB Push Ratchet), UI **khГҙng** hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ ngay nб»ҷi dung thб»ұc mГ  dГ№ng mб»ҷt hГ ng Skeleton cб»‘ Д‘б»Ӣnh:
  - Title dбәЎng generic: `"ThГҙng bГЎo bбәЈo mбәӯt Д‘ang Д‘Ж°б»Јc giбәЈi mГЈ..."` hoбә·c `"Дҗang giбәЈi mГЈ an toГ n..."`.
  - Subtitle hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ Blur/Skeleton bar (khб»‘i mб»қ 60вҖ“70% width), khГҙng lб»ҷ tб»« khГіa hay nб»ҷi dung nhбәЎy cбәЈm.
- рҹ“ұ Ngay khi Main App mб»ҹ vГ  Д‘б»“ng bб»ҷ xong `Push_Key`/MLS Epoch, hГ ng Skeleton Д‘Ж°б»Јc thay thбәҝ bбәұng nб»ҷi dung thбәӯt bбәұng hiб»Үu б»©ng fade 0.15s; nбәҝu Д‘б»“ng bб»ҷ thбәҘt bбәЎi, Skeleton chuyб»ғn thГ nh trбәЎng thГЎi lб»—i an toГ n `"KhГҙng thб»ғ giбәЈi mГЈ вҖ” chбәЎm Д‘б»ғ thб»ӯ lбәЎi"` thay vГ¬ hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ rГЎc.

### Mesh Mode Behavior

Header banner: `"Mesh Mode Active вҖ“ Files syncing locally"`

File icons:

- рҹ“Ў Local
- вҳҒ Sync Pending

Sync animation: subtle pulse.

#### Skeleton UI cho File Д‘Ж°б»Јc mб»ҹ tб»« Notification khi nб»ҷi dung cГІn Д‘ang giбәЈi mГЈ

- рҹ“ұрҹ’» Khi ngЖ°б»қi dГ№ng chбәЎm vГ o Notification dбә«n tб»ӣi mб»ҷt file (PDF/Video) Д‘Ж°б»Јc bбәЈo vб»Ү E2EE, mГ n `Files`/Viewer phбәЈi hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ **khung xЖ°ЖЎng an toГ n** trong lГәc Core Rust Д‘ang giбәЈi mГЈ:

## 15. Admin Console (Role-based вҖ” chб»ү Admin thбәҘy)

Entry point: Settings вҶ’ `[Admin Console]` button.

### Tab Structure

| Tab | Chб»©c nДғng |
|---|---|
| **User Management** | Invite Token, Revoke, Remote Wipe |
| **Key Management** | KMS Bootstrap, Master Key status, Epoch Rotation |
| **OPA Policies** | TбәЎo/sб»ӯa/xГіa chГӯnh sГЎch per-department |

### TrбәЈi nghiб»Үm QuбәЈn trб»Ӣ 1-ChбәЎm (Wizard-driven UX)

#### Khб»ҹi tбәЎo Cб»Ҙm Trб»ұc quan (Cluster Setup Wizard)

1. **Pre-flight Check** вҖ” Scan phбә§n cб»©ng + network. Status badge вң… / вқҢ. NГәt `[Deploy Cluster]` chб»ү sГЎng khi Д‘б»§ Д‘iб»Ғu kiб»Үn.
2. **Config Form** вҖ” Dropdown chб»Қn provider (Vultr/DO), nhбәӯp 3 IP, drag-drop `id_rsa`. KhГҙng terminal.
3. **Deploy Progress Bar** вҖ” PhГўn nбәҘc `WireGuard вҶ’ Longhorn вҶ’ K8s вҶ’ Ready`. Text ngГҙn ngб»Ҝ tб»ұ nhiГӘn, khГҙng log terminal.
4. **Bootstrap QR** вҖ” QR code Д‘б»ғ Admin scan trГӘn mobile вҶ’ thiбәҝt lбәӯp kГӘnh mTLS, tб»ұ Д‘бә·t IP/Port.
5. **Day-2 Dashboard** вҖ” Cluster health `3/3 Online`, storage gauge, 1-click `[Zero-Downtime Update]`.

#### Mб»ҹ rб»ҷng Cб»Ҙm KhГҙng GiГЎn ДҗoбәЎn (Add Node Wizard)

- BбәЈng trЖ°б»Јt tб»‘i giбәЈn: nhбәӯp 3 trЖ°б»қng вҖ” IP Address, Node Label, SSH Key.
- Progress Д‘б»ҷng: `Initializing вҶ’ Joining вҶ’ Ready`.
- Rollback tб»ұ Д‘б»ҷng + thГҙng bГЎo tiбәҝng ngЖ°б»қi nбәҝu Node thбәҘt bбәЎi.

#### PhбәЈn hб»“i Thб»қi gian thб»ұc

- Biб»ғu Д‘б»“ Д‘б»ҷng: WireGuard speed, Cluster capacity tДғng gб»ҷp theo thб»қi gian thб»ұc.
- K8s Scheduler tб»ұ cГўn bбәұng tбәЈi sang Node Гӯt bбәӯn hЖЎn.

# PHбәҰN VI вҖ“ CГҒC GIAO DIб»ҶN Mб»һ Rб»ҳNG (SSO & LIГҠN Tб»” CHб»ЁC)

## 22. Giao diб»Үn ДҗДғng nhбәӯp (Enterprise SSO Login)

TeraChat tuyб»Үt Д‘б»‘i khГҙng dГ№ng xГЎc thб»ұc mбәӯt khбә©u cб»Ҙc bб»ҷ. Mб»Қi luб»“ng Login Д‘б»Ғu qua Identity Broker (Keycloak/Dex) kбәҝt nб»‘i Azure AD, Google Workspace hoбә·c Okta.

### Layout Desktop/Mobile (MГ n hГ¬nh Welcome)

- **Background (Layer 1):** Dark navy gradient tД©nh, blur sГўu tбәЎo cбәЈm giГЎc chГ¬m sГўu (immerse).
- **Center Glass Card (Layer 4):** Khб»‘i thбә» xГЎc thб»ұc lЖЎ lб»ӯng giб»Ҝa mГ n hГ¬nh, radius 24px. Glass Dark (blur 20px, `rgba(20,30,45,0.6)`), viб»Ғn phГЎt sГЎng nhбә№ `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)`.

content_blocks.text: в”Ӯ  [ рҹ”‘ Log in with Microsoft Azure AD     ]  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  [ рҹӣЎпёҸ Log in with Google Workspace       ]  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ       в”Җ Hoбә·c xГЎc thб»ұc phбә§n cб»©ng в”Җ           в”Ӯ

content_blocks.code:
**UX & Motion Logic (Zero-Trust Core Initialization):**

- **Biometric-Bound Initialization (BбәҜt buб»ҷc Sinh trбәҜc hб»Қc):** Ngay sau khi Identity Broker (SSO) trбәЈ vб»Ғ thГ nh cГҙng, LГөi Rust tбәЎm dб»«ng tiбәҝn trГ¬nh vГ  bбәӯt Native Prompt cб»§a OS (FaceID/TouchID).
  > *"TeraChat cбә§n FaceID Д‘б»ғ khб»ҹi tбәЎo KhГіa phбә§n cб»©ng (Device_Key)"*
  > Nбәҝu thбәҘt bбәЎi 3 lбә§n, chuyб»ғn sang luб»“ng Cryptographic PIN Fallback.
- **Cryptographic PIN Fallback UI:** Giao diб»Үn bГ n phГӯm sб»‘ (Dialpad) 6 Гҙ vuГҙng cб»ұc kб»і tб»‘i giбәЈn (Glassmorphism trЖЎn, khГҙng cГі bГіng viб»Ғn).
  - PIN Д‘Ж°б»Јc truyб»Ғn thбәіng qua **FFI Pointer** xuб»‘ng LГөi Rust mГ  khГҙng lЖ°u lбәЎi trГӘn State cб»§a React Native.
  - PhГӯa dЖ°б»ӣi hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ dГІng chб»Ҝ cбәЈnh bГЎo mб»қ: `Attempt X/5`.
- **TrбәЈi nghiб»Үm BбәЈo mбәӯt Hб»§y dб»Ҝ liб»Үu (Ruthless Self-Destruct & Memory Zeroization):** Nбәҝu nhбәӯp sai PIN lбә§n thб»© 5 hoбә·c nhбәӯn lб»Үnh `Remote Wipe`.
  - рҹ“ұрҹ’» **Remote Wipe & Secure Enclave Wipe:** Lб»Үnh `Remote Wipe` thб»ұc thi xГіa trбәҜng Private Key trong chip bбәЈo mбәӯt (Secure Enclave/StrongBox) thГҙng qua tГӯn hiб»Үu tб»« SCIM/OIDC Listener.
  - рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **Memory Zeroization:** CЖЎ chбәҝ `ZeroizeOnDrop` (RAII) lбәӯp tб»©c thб»ұc hiб»Үn ghi Д‘ГЁ `0x00` lГӘn toГ n bб»ҷ vГ№ng nhб»ӣ nhбәЎy cбәЈm trГӘn RAM ngay khi lб»Үnh hб»§y Д‘Ж°б»Јc kГӯch hoбәЎt.
  - рҹ“ұрҹ’»рҹ–ҘпёҸ **Crypto-Shredding:** ДҗГЎnh dбәҘu cГЎc sector dб»Ҝ liб»Үu lГ  rГЎc ngay lбәӯp tб»©c sau khi xГіa KEK.
  - рҹ“ұ **Ruthless Visualization:** MГ n hГ¬nh nhГЎy Д‘б»Ҹ rб»ұc (Red Flash blend mode: overlay, 0.2s). HoбәЎt cбәЈnh Pixel Disintegration (RГЈ Д‘iб»ғm бәЈnh) hoбә·c Glitch effect Д‘Ж°б»Јc Д‘бә©y trб»ұc tiбәҝp xuб»‘ng Native UI Thread Д‘б»ғ Д‘бәЈm bбәЈo Д‘б»ҷ mЖ°б»Јt 120fps trЖ°б»ӣc khi app vДғng ra Loading Screen ban Д‘бә§u (TrбәЎng thГЎi Factory Reset).
- **Tiбәҝn trГ¬nh Khб»ҹi tбәЎo mЖ°б»Јt mГ :** Nбәҝu xГЎc thб»ұc thГ nh cГҙng (Biometrics/PIN), hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ thanh Progress bar (chiб»Ғu cao 4px, mГ u `#24A1DE`) chбәЎy fade-in trong `< 3 giГўy` vб»ӣi dГІng text *"Дҗang thiбәҝt lбәӯp LГөi Mбәӯt MГЈ..."*.
- **Input Workspace ID:** Nб»Ғn glass trбәҜng mб»қ, outline chuyб»ғn `#24A1DE` cГ№ng bГіng Д‘б»• mб»қ khi focus/active.
- **Button Style:** Background sб»ӯ dб»Ҙng mГ u thЖ°ЖЎng hiб»Үu cб»§a SSO (Azure Blue/Google Gray) nhЖ°ng bбәҜt buб»ҷc blend theo Layer Glass nhбә№ Д‘б»ғ khГҙng phГЎ vб»Ў tГӯnh nguyГӘn khб»‘i cбәҘu trГәc UI tб»•ng thб»ғ.

## 23. Giao diб»Үn Thiбәҝt lбәӯp Chi nhГЎnh (Cross-Cluster Federation Handshake)

Luб»“ng kбәҝt nб»‘i HQ vГ  Chi nhГЎnh Д‘Ж°б»Јc Д‘б»Ӣnh vб»Ӣ tбәЎi **Admin Console > Federation**. Mб»Ҙc tiГӘu UX: Biбәҝn mб»ҷt luб»“ng kбәҝt nб»‘i mбәӯt mГЈ mTLS phб»©c tбәЎp thГ nh trбәЈi nghiб»Үm "Click & Connect" trб»ұc quan.

### б»һ phГӯa Tб»•ng cГҙng ty (HQ Admin)

1. **CTA Button:** NГәt `[ + Generate Federation Invite ]` nбәұm gГіc phбәЈi trГӘn (Primary `#24A1DE`).
2. **Setup Modal (Slide tб»« trung tГўm):**
   - TГӘn Chi nhГЎnh: Khung Input field thЖ°б»қng.
   - Quyб»Ғn hбәЎn OPA: Dropdown menu bo gГіc, tГӯch hб»Јp icon trбәЎng thГЎi (Vd: `рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Chб»ү Reply`, `рҹ’¬ NhбәҜn tin`).
   - Thб»қi hбәЎn Token: Slider kГ©o thбәЈ linh hoбәЎt `1h вҖ” 24h` dГЎn nhГЈn mГ u.
3. **Kбәҝt quбәЈ (Success State):** Sinh JWT Token khб»•ng lб»“ Д‘б»ғ mб»қi Chi nhГЎnh.
   - Modal chia 2 cб»ҷt: Cб»ҷt trГЎi hiб»Үn mГЈ QR Scan Д‘б»ҷ tЖ°ЖЎng phбәЈn cao (radius 16px). Cб»ҷt phбәЈi Д‘Гӯnh hб»ҷp JWT Hash cГі thб»ғ scroll dб»Қc kГЁm nГәt `[ Copy Token ]` + icon clipboard.

### б»һ phГӯa Chi nhГЎnh (Branch Admin)

1. Mб»ҹ Admin Console > Federation. Click `[ Join Federation Network ]`.
2. **Modal Nhбәӯp Token:** Khung Paste lб»ӣn chiбәҝm 50% modal. Ngay khi paste, **LГөi Rust (WASM)** phГўn tГӯch realtime (<50ms) vГ  load ra thбә» Info Card xГЎc nhбәӯn tin cбәӯy:
   > вҡ пёҸ **BбәЈo mбәӯt:** BбәЎn Д‘ang yГӘu cбә§u kбәҝt nб»‘i mTLS vб»ӣi mГЎy chб»§ **[TГӘn HQ]**. TrбәЎng thГЎi chб»©ng chб»ү: *Hб»Јp lб»Ү*.
3. **Animation `[ Confirm & Handshake ]`:** Giб»Ҝ nguyГӘn hiб»Үu б»©ng Loading Spinner tбәЎi nГәt trong 1-2s. Sau khi Handshake xong, xuбәҘt hiб»Үn mГ n hГ¬nh phГЎo hoa mini tinh tбәҝ hoбә·c tick `вң… Connected` sang mбәЈng mГ u xanh Success tЖ°ЖЎi sГЎng.

Thiбәҝt kбәҝ giao diб»Үn cho luб»“ng Д‘б»“ng bб»ҷ nhГўn sб»ұ lб»ӣn tб»« Azure AD/HR xuб»‘ng, thay vГ¬ mб»қi thб»§ cГҙng rб»§i ro. Thao tГЎc tбәЎi **Admin Console > User Management**.

**Dashboard Control (DбәЈi Ribbon trГӘn cГ№ng):**

content_blocks.text: [TrбәЎng thГЎi SCIM 2.0: рҹҹў ACTIVE]   |   Lбә§n Д‘б»“ng bб»ҷ: 2 phГәt trЖ°б»ӣc  |  [Sync Now] [Config Rules]
